_comment: M11 size ceilings — minified + gzip (bytes). Guards against accidental bloat while the framework is still being built; bump a limit deliberately when a feature legitimately grows it. runtime-full is the WHOLE runtime+dom surface bundled together (NOT what an app ships — that's counter-app, kept tight). It was the plan's ~3.6 kB class at M11; Phase A added context, onMount, lazy, @defer, and error boundaries, so it was bumped to 4400 to leave room for the remaining Phase A features (use: actions). reactive-core grew 1024->1126 because error-boundary routing in run() is on the core hot path (not tree-shakeable). counter-app stays the real-world guard.
